# Koh Hom — Software, AI, and Inner Practice

> Notes on software, AI, systems, and the practice of living well. A bilingual personal knowledge site by Koh Hom (Xu Feng).

## About the Author

Koh Hom is a software engineer currently working on frontend systems. His writing covers reliable software, frontend architecture, AI-assisted development, learning systems, and inner practice.

## Main Paths

- Engineering: frontend systems, reliability, performance, testing, and architecture.
- AI & Agents: AI-assisted development, agent systems, automation, and human-AI workflows.
- Systems & Learning: learning methods, abstractions, mental models, and computer science notes.
- Mind & Practice: Buddhism, attention, reading notes, and reflections on living well.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://clean99.github.io/
- Writing: https://clean99.github.io/writing/
- Projects: https://clean99.github.io/projects/
- For Interviewers: https://clean99.github.io/interviewers/
- About: https://clean99.github.io/About/
